title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Roche India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Roche India
jsonLd.description:
Roche India has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Ahmedabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Roche India:
Roche India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Roche India!
